news.headline: FBI earned $14,500 in profit from Ethereum token intended to catch fraudsters.
news.summary: Data from the blockchain indicates that the FBI generated approximately $14,500 in profit by launching an Ethereum token designed to deter market manipulators.

news.headline: Dun & Bradstreet's Q4 2024 report shows 7% increase in business optimism, with nearly 80% businesses optimistic about orders and expenditure.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Dun & Bradstreet, a prominent global provider of business data and analytics (NYSE: DNB), has published its Q4 2024 Global Business Optimism Insights report. Conducted in Q3 2024, the report indicates a 7% rise in business optimism compared to the previous quarter. This increase is attributed to a gradual reduction in inflation rates and favorable borrowing conditions. The survey shows that nearly 80% of businesses are more optimistic about both domestic and export orders, as well as capital expenditure.

news.headline: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund changes distribution to monthly payments from quarterly starting November 2024.
news.summary: Houston, October 10, 2024 - The Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. disclosed a shift in its distribution payment schedule, transitioning from quarterly to monthly disbursements starting November 2024. This modification aims to benefit shareholders by providing more regular income streams.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices drop: Bitcoin at $59,579.75 (-2.4%), Ethereum at $2,360.93 (-2.3%), Dogecoin at $0.1044 (-3.9%). Large transaction volume and active addresses decline notably. 71,977 traders liquidated in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs show outflows for 2nd day.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets saw a decline with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing consecutive outflows for the second day, while Ethereum's market activity remained subdued. The current prices and fluctuations are as follows: Bitcoin at $59,579.75 (-2.4%), Ethereum at $2,360.93 (-2.3%), Solana at $137.54 (-2.1%), Dogecoin at $0.1044 (-3.9%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001643 (-3.4%).Noteworthy data indicates a 25.7% decrease in large transaction volumes, an 18.8% drop in daily active addresses, and transactions over $100,000 decreased from 9,459 to 7,555 within a day. Exchanges netflows are down by 79.4%. Additionally, Coinglass data reveals that 71,977 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours. For more details, the full Benzinga.com story can be accessed.

news.headline: Autopsy shows NC farmworker Jose Mendoza died from pre-existing condition, not heat; released by Medical Examiner's Office.
news.summary: In Spring Hope, North Carolina, on October 10, 2024, the North Carolina Medical Examiner's Office released an autopsy report on José Arturo González Mendoza, a farmworker at Barnes Farming Corporation who passed away in September. The report revealed that Mendoza's cause of death was attributed to a pre-existing condition, not heat-related issues. This information brings clarity to the circumstances surrounding the farmworker's death.

news.headline: Willow Tree Credit Partners closes first CLO for $353.4 million, marking a significant milestone for the firm.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Willow Tree Credit Partners LP revealed the completion of a $353.4 million Collateralized Loan Obligation (CLO), known as Willow Tree CLO I. This CLO marks a significant milestone for the fast-expanding private credit alternatives firm, showcasing their successful fundraising efforts. The closure of the first CLO by Willow Tree is a notable achievement in their journey.

news.headline: MSA Safety to hold Q3 2024 earnings call, a global leader in safety products.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based company, MSA Safety Incorporated, known for innovative safety products, reported plans to hold their Q3 earnings event on October 10, 2024. Trading under NYSE as MSA, they are recognized for developing advanced safety solutions safeguarding individuals and facilities globally.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties reveals 2024 Q3 sales and revenue; Financial results release scheduled for Nov 7.
news.summary: PRESS RELEASE - Vancouver, BC, Oct. 10, 2024 - Sandstorm Gold Ltd. ("Sandstorm Gold Royalties", "Sandstorm", or the "Company") announced its third-quarter sales and revenue results for the period ending September 30, 2024. During this period, the Company reported a total revenue of $XXX million, reflecting an increase of XX% compared to the previous quarter. The sales figures for the third quarter amounted to XXX ounces of gold, showcasing a XX% growth from the second quarter. Sandstorm Gold Royalties' strong performance in the third quarter underscores its position as a leader in the industry. The Company's stocks are listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol SAND and on TSX under SSL.

news.headline: KB Home will pay a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share on November 27, 2024 to stockholders of record on November 14, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the board of directors of KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share for the Company's common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on November 27, 2024, to stockholders who are recorded on November 14, 2024. KB Home, a leading homebuilder in the United States, has an extensive history spanning over 65 years and has constructed more than 680,000 quality homes. Operating in 47 markets, KB Home holds the prestigious title of being the number one customer-ranked national homebuilder.

news.headline: SunLink Health Systems sells Trace Regional Hospital real estate in Houston, Mississippi for $2 million; retains $1.932 million.
news.summary: SunLink Health Systems, Inc. disclosed that its subsidiary, Southern Health Corporation of Houston, Inc., along with an affiliate, have successfully finalized the transaction for selling the hospital building and associated real estate of the formerly managed Trace Regional Hospital in Houston, Mississippi. The sale amounted to around $2,000,000, resulting in net proceeds of roughly $1,932,000 which will be utilized for working capital and general corporate objectives.

news.headline: CBL Properties buys 500,000 shares for $12.525 million in block trade, separate from $25 million repurchase program.
news.summary: CBL Properties disclosed today the acquisition of 500,000 shares of CBL stock for $12.525 million in a private block trade from a sole shareholder. This buyback is distinct from CBL's ongoing stock repurchase initiative. The company's Board of Directors had previously sanctioned a program on August 10, 2023, permitting the repurchase of up to $25.0 million worth of its common stock.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community "Maple Hill" in Caldwell, ID with modern homes designed for today's living.
news.summary: In Caldwell, Idaho, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveiled its latest community, Maple Hill, catering to modern living needs. The new homes boast contemporary designs, such as spacious kitchens connected to large great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage. The community offers one- and two-story houses with up to five bedrooms and three bathrooms, addressing the increasing demand for versatile living spaces. This move underscores KB Home's commitment to meeting evolving housing preferences and strengthening its position as a leading homebuilder in the U.S.

news.headline: Fastenal to pay cash dividend of $0.39 per share on Nov 22, 2024 to shareholders of record on Oct 25, 2024.
news.summary: In Winona, Minnesota, Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) has announced that its board of directors has approved a dividend of $0.39 per share. The dividend will be paid on November 22, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 25, 2024. The company has been paying annual dividends since 1991 and semi-annual dividends since 2003. All dollar amounts mentioned, except for per-share information, are in millions. Fastenal commonly refers to itself as 'we', 'our', or 'us'.

news.headline: KB Home adds Cheryl J. Henry to Board of Directors on Oct 10, 2024. Initial term until 2025 stockholder meeting. Ms. Henry was CEO of Ruth's Hospitality Group.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based KB Home (NYSE: KBH) revealed the appointment of Cheryl J. Henry to its Board of Directors on October 10, 2024. She will serve on the Board’s Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. Ms. Henry, the ex-President, CEO, and Chairwoman of Ruth's Hospitality Group, Inc., will hold office until KB Home’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where she will seek stockholder approval.

news.headline: FCL-X™ Lithium-ion Battery Fire Extinguisher passed rigorous Dutch test; now on Amazon due to rising battery fire incidents.
news.summary: The increasing occurrence of fires involving lithium-ion batteries in residential and industrial settings has highlighted the necessity for improved safety protocols. FCL-X™ has recently cleared the Dutch standardized test, NTA 8133, recognized as the strictest test for portable fire extinguishers designed for lithium-ion battery fires. This comes as a vital development as the number of incidents involving such batteries continues to rise, emphasizing the pressing need for enhanced safety measures.

news.headline: Norfolk Southern donates $400K to Red Cross for Hurricane relief, total contributions in 2024 reach $775K.
news.summary: The Red Cross has received a total of $775,000 in contributions for disaster recovery in 2024. On October 10, 2024, Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) made a generous donation of $400,000 to support the American Red Cross's extensive relief operations in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene.

news.headline: Dolby Labs (NYSE: DLB) will release Q4 fiscal 2024 results on Nov. 19, 2024 after market close. Conference call planned.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Dolby Laboratories, Inc., a prominent player in immersive entertainment, announced that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter (Q4) and complete fiscal year 2024 post the regular trading hours on Tuesday, November 19, 2024. Dolby Laboratories is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DLB. This announcement is eagerly anticipated by investors, analysts, and stakeholders, and will provide insights into the company's performance.

news.headline: BD will announce fiscal 2024 Q4 and full year financial results and later hold webcasts for fiscal 2025 earnings.
news.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a prominent global medical technology company, has revealed the schedule for its fiscal 2025 quarterly earnings webcasts. The organization, headquartered in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, made this announcement on October 10, 2024. BD, listed as BDX on the NYSE, will present its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024 on the specified dates.

news.headline: Dow announces 70 cents per share dividend, to be paid on Dec 13, 2024, 453rd in a row since 1912.
news.summary: Midland based Dow, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DOW, announced a dividend payment of 70 cents per share on October 10, 2024. The payment will be made on December 13, 2024, to shareholders recorded on November 29, 2024. This upcoming dividend will be the 453rd consecutive dividend issued by Dow or its affiliated companies since 1912. Dow is known for its long-standing history of consistent dividend payments.

news.headline: Universal Logistics Holdings will report Q3 2024 earnings on Oct. 24, after market closes. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULH) from Warren, Michigan, is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on October 24, 2024. The company will release these results after the market closes on that day. Following the release, a quarterly earnings conference call is scheduled to provide further insights. Keep an eye out for updates on this conference call to learn more about the performance of Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. in the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Carrier Global Corporation's Board declared a $0.19 quarterly dividend per share of Carrier common stock, as of Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on October 10, 2024, Carrier Global Corporation declared a quarterly dividend of $0.19 per outstanding share of Carrier common stock. The company, a leading provider of intelligent climate and energy solutions, is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CARR.

news.headline: EQT Corp (NYSE: EQT) declares $0.1575 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Dec 2, 2024, to shareholders on record by Nov 6.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 10, 2024, EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1575 per share for its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on December 2, 2024, to shareholders of record as of the end of business on November 6.

news.headline: Sunstone Hotel Investors (NYSE: SHO) update on Q3 operations and impact on full-year 2024 outlook.
news.summary: In Aliso Viejo, California, on October 10, 2024, a real estate investment company Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. (NYSE: SHO) shared its latest operational performance for the third quarter. The company revised its full-year 2024 outlook based on recent activities.

news.headline: NXG Cushing® Midstream Energy Fund (NYSE: SRV) announces terms of rights offering to common shareholders.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 10, 2024, the board of trustees of NXG Cushing® Midstream Energy Fund (NYSE: SRV) has confirmed the terms for the distribution of transferable rights to common shareholders. The fund, identified with the ticker symbol SRV, is offering this opportunity to its shareholders.

news.headline: Piedmont Office Realty Trust (NYSE: PDM) reports no damage from Hurricane Milton in Orlando. All properties and personnel safe.
news.summary: Today, Piedmont Office Realty Trust, a Real Estate Investment Trust owning Class A office properties mainly in major U.S. Sunbelt markets like Orlando, FL, shared that following an evaluation of detailed property reports for all of its Orlando assets, virtually no harm was observed from Hurricane Milton. The property management team confirmed the safety of all personnel in the influenced regions. No significant damage was reported on any of Piedmont's properties due to the hurricane.

news.headline: Southside Bancshares, Inc. to release Q3 financial results on Oct 24, 2024, with a conference call at 11:00 a.m. CDT.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Southside Bancshares, Inc. revealed that it will share its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 before the market opens on October 24, 2024. Southside, the parent company of Southside Bank and listed as NASDAQ: SBSI, plans to conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. CDT the same day to discuss these results. Investors and stakeholders can expect an in-depth review of the company's performance during the call.

news.headline: The RealReal will release its Q3 financial results on Nov 4, 2024; largest online luxury resale marketplace.
news.summary: In San Francisco, The RealReal (Nasdaq: REAL), the leading online platform for verified resale luxury items, disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024, concluding on September 30. The report is scheduled for release on November 4, 2024, post market closure.

news.headline: MediaAlpha to disclose Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024.
Howard Yu appointed to Carpenter Technology's Board of Directors on Oct 9, 2024. $CRS stock (NYSE) mentioned.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Philadelphia, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) revealed the addition of Howard Yu to its Board of Directors, a move effective the previous day.

news.headline: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. is holding a conference call on Nov 14, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) for fiscal Q4 earnings. CEO and CFO will join.
news.summary: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) will hold its fiscal fourth quarter 2024 earnings conference call on November 14, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. (ET). Participants include John Lindsay, President and CEO, Kevin Vann, Senior Vice President and CFO, and Dave Wilson, Vice President of Investor Relations. Investors can join the call either via phone or audio webcast.

news.headline: World Kinect Corp (NYSE: WKC) to hold Q3 2024 earnings call on Oct 24, 2024, at 5:00 pm ET to discuss results. Visit ir.worldkinect.com/events.
news.summary: World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) based in Miami, is hosting a conference call on Thursday, October 24, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET to review the company's performance in the third quarter of 2024 and discuss future prospects. The third quarter results will be unveiled after the market closes on the same day. To join the live webcast, interested individuals can visit ir.worldkinect.com/events. This event offers an opportunity to engage directly with the management team and gain insights into the company's financial status and outlook.

news.headline: Board member of Argan, Inc. W.G. Champion Mitchell passed away on Oct 8, 2024, after serving since 2003.
news.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) based in Rockville, Md., shared the unfortunate news of the passing of board member W.G. Champion Mitchell on October 8, 2024. Mr. Mitchell had been a part of Argan’s Board of Directors since October 2003 and was actively involved in the Executive Committee and the Nominating/Corporate Governance Committee. Aside from his role at Argan, he also held board positions at two private firms: Direct Brands, Inc. and The 41st Parameter, Inc. He was a valued member of the business community and will be dearly missed.

news.headline: Laureate Education to announce Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 31 before market opens, hosting call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Laureate Education, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAUR) based in Miami, announced that their financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, will be disclosed on October 31, 2024, prior to the opening of the stock market. A conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day for investors and analysts to review the second quarter performance and the company's future prospects.

news.headline: California Water Service Group (NYSE: CWT) to release 2024 Q3 earnings on Oct 31 at 9am ET, conference call at 11am ET.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, San Jose, California - California Water Service Group (NYSE: CWT) revealed that the earnings report for the third quarter of 2024 will be disclosed at 9:00 a.m. ET, with an earnings conference call scheduled to commence at 11:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Carlyle Secured Lending, Inc. prices $300M public offering of 6.750% unsecured notes due 2030. Offering set to close on Oct 18.
news.summary: Carlyle Secured Lending, Inc. (Nasdaq: CGBD) disclosed that they have set the price for their underwritten public offering of $300 million worth of 6.750% unsecured notes due 2030. These notes, which will mature on February 18, 2030, come with the option for the Company to redeem them wholly or partially at the specified redemption price. The closing of this offering is anticipated to be on October 18, 2024, pending the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites.

news.headline: Veris Residential, Inc. schedules Third Quarter 2024 financial results and webcast. Based in Jersey City.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE: VRE), a progressive real estate investment trust focused on environmental and social responsibility, based in Jersey City, New Jersey, revealed its latest updates. Veris Residential specializes in Class A multifamily properties, engaging in ownership, operation, acquisition, and development.

news.headline: Coursera set to reveal Q3 2024 financial performance.
Artivion presents positive findings at EACTS Annual Meeting: 94% patients free from reoperation, 90% cerebral malperfusion resolution.
news.summary: The latest findings from the AMDS DARTS trial reveal promising results in aortic remodeling with 94% of patients avoiding unforeseen reoperations. Additionally, initial observations from the AMDS PERSEVERE trial indicate that 90% of subjects experiencing cerebral malperfusion showed resolution following AMDS implantation. Stay tuned for the complete 1-year data report from the trials.

news.headline: Mercy introduces Eversense 365, a 365-day continuous glucose monitor for Type 1 & Type 2 diabetes patients. Launch by Ascensia Diabetes Care with new campaign.
news.summary: The Eversense 365 by Senseonics has received approval in the United States as an integrated continuous glucose monitoring (iCGM) system for individuals aged 18 and above with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes. Ascensia Diabetes Care is currently initiating the commercial launch of this system. Their new campaign aims to emphasize the distinctive advantages of utilizing this system for managing diabetes.

news.headline: Learn about how Adobe utilizes AI for enhancing operational efficiencies on Bloomberg.
Crane NXT, Co. sets dates for Q3 2024 earnings release and call. Stay tuned for update on financial performance.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global greenhouse gas emissions have reached a record high of 55.3 billion metric tons in 2021. This increase of 2.5% from the previous year is primarily attributed to the rebound in economic activities following the COVID-19 pandemic. The data also showed that China remains the largest emitter of greenhouse gases with 12.4 billion metric tons, followed by the United States with 5.8 billion metric tons. The report highlighted the urgent need for countries to accelerate efforts in reducing emissions to combat climate change effectively.

news.headline: Carpenter Technology declares quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on Dec 5, 2024 to record shareholders on Oct 22.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) disclosed the approval by its Board of Directors of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common stock share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on December 5, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Join Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE: MHK) Third Quarter 2024 earnings conference call on Oct 25, 2024, 11:00 am ET.
news.summary: A conference call will be held on October 25, 2024, at 11:00 am ET to discuss Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE: MHK) Third Quarter 2024 earnings. The call follows the earnings release set for October 24, 2024. The event will be broadcast live.

news.headline: Buenaventura to hold Q3 2024 earnings call on Oct 31, 2024, with CEO Leandro García Raggio and team reviewing financial results.
news.summary: In Lima, Peru, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM) has announced that their Third Quarter 2024 earnings conference call is scheduled for Thursday, October 31, 2024, at 12:00 PM (Eastern Time) and 11:00 AM (Lima Time). The call will feature Leandro García Raggio, Chief Executive Officer, along with other senior management members, who will review Buenaventura’s financial and operating results for the third quarter.

news.headline: Microsoft will release fiscal year 2025 Q1 financial results on Oct 30, 2024, after market close. Live webcast available.
news.summary: Software giant Microsoft Corporation has announced that it will release its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 on October 30, 2024. The report will be published after the market closes and will be available on the Microsoft Investor Relations website. Interested individuals can access the live webcast of the event on the company's website. The publication of these results will provide stakeholders and investors with crucial insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Aritzia (TSX: ATZ) releases Q2 fiscal 2025 results showing gains in revenue and profit, exceeding expectations.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on October 10, 2024, Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ) unveiled their financial performance for the second quarter concluding on... Aritzia, known for their Everyday Luxury brand available both online and in-store, shared the latest numbers with the public.

news.headline: Heron Therapeutics assures ample supply of CINVANTI®, SUSTOL®, and APONVIE® amid IV fluids shortage. #HRTX #biotech
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in San Diego, Heron Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HRTX) announced its commitment to continue providing CINVANTI® (aprepitant) injectable emulsion and SUSTOL® (granisetron) extended-release. As a commercial-stage biotechnology company, Heron affirmed its capability to supply these important medications.

news.headline: Disinfo hampers hurricane recovery; experts caution it can pose real risks and hinder aid efforts.
news.summary: Meteorological experts have cautioned that disseminating misleading information about weather conditions could swiftly lead to tangible dangers and divert attention from essential assistance efforts.

news.headline: Oil-Dri reports record sales and gross profit in Q4, achieves highest annual net income in company history in FY 2024.
news.summary: Oil-Dri Corporation of America, a company trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol ODC, shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on October 10, 2024, in Chicago. Oil-Dri is recognized for manufacturing and selling sorbent mineral products.
